creator: kreinholz@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Gleb Popov from comment #25)

I am no longer able to reproduce. Apparently, uninstalling and then reinstalling gcc resulted in the build detecting LLVM first and selecting it over gcc.

If that's the case, the error may have nothing to do with ghc, but rather, a package registration issue when I first installed gcc that has since been fixed.

Either way, hopefully the information in this bug report will help someone else if caught in this same edge case.
